sql.query: SELECT 'unassigned:' AS assignmentKey,'Unassigned' AS assignmentLabel,0 AS sortGroup UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT('user:',u.id),CONCAT('User - ',u.displayName),1 FROM tbl_user_tenant_roles utr INNER JOIN tbl_users u ON u.id=utr.userId WHERE utr.tenantId=:tenantId AND utr.isActive=1 UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT('team:',tm.id),CONCAT('Team - ',tm.teamName),2 FROM tbl_teams tm WHERE tm.tenantId=:tenantId2 AND tm.isActive=1 UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT('role:',r.id),CONCAT('Role - ',r.roleName),3 FROM tbl_roles r ORDER BY sortGroup,assignmentLabel
